sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10264" key="a)ntipara/dosis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρά-δοσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutual accommodation,</tr_> of heavenly bodies, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:162:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
